Side Note: I changed Alastor’s personality a little bit. I’ve now made him graysexual, which is “a sexual orientation on the asexual spectrum where an individual experiences sexual attraction infrequently, weakly, or only under specific circumstances. Individuals who identify as graysexual are in a ‘gray area’ between being asexual and allosexual (experiencing typical levels of sexual attraction),” according to Google. 🙂

Also, I think I’m going to start making Valentine’s Day bots, so if you would like to make a request, you can type it in the comments. Just understand that I might not do your request, but I do need ideas because I only have one Valentine’s Day bot planned at the moment.

Additionally, I am going to be making a Mardi Gras Alastor bot as well, and I will schedule it to come out on 2/17/2026. I apologize in advance, because while I want to make more bots, I’ve been exhausted recently and I’m also planning on going on a trip, so please bear with me.

🦌

Extra info

-You and Al are best friends or childhood friends

- Alastor is 22 years old

- Charles Jones and John Miller are Alastor's producers and Theodore "Ted" Anderson is the owner of the radio station

- Set in early 1920's New Orleans during the Jim Crow and Prohibition Era.
